channel.title: Cheatsheet on Waldy's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cheatsheet on Waldy's blog

item.title: Cheatsheet Lengkap Git
item.description: Cheatsheet praktis Git untuk development sehari-hari — command, branching, merging, rebasing, stashing, logging, undo, dan workflow kolaborasi.

item.title: Cheatsheet Lengkap Regex
item.description: Cheatsheet praktis regular expressions (regex) untuk coding harian — sintaks, quantifier, group, lookahead, pola umum, dan contoh di JavaScript, Python, dan Vim.

item.title: Cheatsheet Lengkap Vim / Neovim
item.description: Cheatsheet praktis Vim dan Neovim untuk coding harian, navigasi, edit teks, buffer, window, macro, search, LSP, terminal, dan workflow produktivitas.
